mapper.select: SELECT id, teacher_profile_id, student_profile_id, active_time, last_msg_id, status, create_time, update_time FROM room WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, teacher_profile_id, student_profile_id, active_time, last_msg_id, status, create_time, update_time FROM room WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

SELECT id, teacher_profile_id, student_profile_id, active_time, last_msg_id, status, create_time, update_time FROM room WHERE teacher_profile_id = #{teacherProfileId} AND student_profile_id = #{studentProfileId} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room (teacher_profile_id, student_profile_id, active_time, last_msg_id, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{teacherProfileId}, #{studentProfileId}, #{activeTime}, #{lastMsgId}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE room SET last_msg_id = #{lastMsgId}, active_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{roomId}
